title: Sl. No. | District | Sponsor Bank | Date of Establishment | Land Allotment Position | NIRD Grant Details
rows: 1.Preliminary Work on construction started by CPWD, Poonkulam, Trivandrum. 2.IOB has sanctioned Rs 325.40 Lac against Govt grant of Rs 100 Lac for construction
Rs. 39.36 lakhs released so far towards construction of permanent premises

22 cents of land was identified for setting up RSETI. The place was erstwhile functioning as Anchalumoodu Block Office. The Commissioner for Rural Development has submitted their recommendations to Government. Waiting for the Government Order.
Rs. 1 crore. Released First Instalment of Rs. 50 lakhs on 11.09.2009
50cents allotted and demarked at Aryad Block Panchayat.: Building Permit from Mannancherry Panchayath obtained on 11.06.2012. Proceedings started for construction.
50 cents of land has been allotted and taken possession in the Pallom block panchayath premises. The trees have to be cut and removed with the approvalof forest department.

The land allotted has been demarcated and the MOU has been signed on 10.02.2012 at the chamber of the Commissioner of Rural Development, Trivandrum along with the Secretary District Panchayat and Deputy General Manager, Union Bank of India. The papers have been forwarded to Higher officials for further action in this matter
Rs. 48.95 lakhs credited to account on 30.07.2010. Amount not yet availed
Revised ‘MoU’ executed for 50 cents of land as per Govt. guidelines on 10.02.2012
1st instalment of Rs. 50 lakhs less TDS = Rs.48.95 lakhs received on 08.02.2010.
